name: Olive Garden Peaches'n Cream Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Canned or firm, ripe fresh
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Lightly grease the base of a 10-inch springform pan.
3. Beat the egg in a 1-1/2 quart bowl with a mixer on high speed until it forms a thick yellow foam.
4. Mix in sugar on low speed until smooth.
5. Add flour, water, vanilla, baking powder, and salt. Mix on low speed until fully blended.
6. Pour batter into the springform pan and roll around until level.
7. Bake for 16 to 18 minutes on the lowest oven rack.
8. Cool to room temperature.
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. In a separate bowl, mix cream cheese, sugar, eggs, and flour with an electric mixer on high speed until smooth.
3. Add vanilla, sour cream, and peach liqueur or flavoring. Mix on medium speed until the mixture is smooth and thick.
4. Gently fold in peach slices to distribute evenly.
5. Pour the cheesecake filling onto the cooled sponge cake base.
6. Bake for 70 minutes on the lower oven rack.
7. Turn off the oven, open the door to broil position, and let the cake remain there for 40 minutes.
8. Cool completely before refrigerating.
Top with fresh whipped cream or equivalent and serve. Store up to 2 days in the refrigerator.
